channel.title: +Corrections on संस्कृत-साङ्गणकाः Sanskrit Programmers
channel.description: Recent content in +Corrections on संस्कृत-साङ्गणकाः Sanskrit Programmers

item.title: Correction software
item.description: Spell checkers OpenOCRCorrect IITB version - more updated Rohit saluja’s version OCR tool

item.title: Distributed proofreading UIs
item.description: Distributed proofreading UIs One can use something like Distributed Proofreaders (http://www.pgdp.net/) or Wikisource (see screenshots here) to proofread the text by seeing the scanned book page beside it. [ Y9fqLZ9 Ambuda ambuda proofing site तत्र register कृत्वा पाठं शोधयितुं सरलं स्यात्। vedavApI textract / bhAratIkosha UI here . Wikisource See here. Common steps: Upload file to archive. Use IA-Upload tool which automatically uploads files to Commons. Create an index page (example).

item.title: Workflow for proofreading on wikisource
item.description: Workflow for proofreading on wikisource Pick a text to proofread. Look for issues with the milestone “ocred”. Index page listings: अनुक्रमणिका search results (Full set!) वर्गः:आनुक्रमणिका विशेषः:IndexPages Proofread!
